testsuite.name: ExampleEntityCriterion Tests

testcase.name: Should handle empty exampleId as valid
Should not support different operation name
Should populate response with request metadata
Should return error when entity data is null
Should handle entity with minimal required fields
Should pass validation for valid entity
Should handle entity with all fields populated
Should fail validation when exampleId is null

testsuite.system-out: 14:11:27.727 [Test worker] WARN com.example.application.criterion.ExampleEntityCriterion -- ExampleEntity is not valid
